video:video.video:title: Fusion Fitness Club Makati - Martial Arts Infused Gym Tour
video:video.video:description: Take a tour of Fusion Fitness Club in Makati City. Experience our martial arts infused fitness classes including Boxing, Muay Thai, MMA, and Yoga at Assembly Grounds, The Rise.
